title: EMI Create Cobble Gen Compat
description: Adds Create's custom cobble gen recipes to EMI
body:
A tiny resource pack that adds Create's custom cobble gen recipes to EMI, these being Lava + Honey -> Limestone, and Lava + Chocolate -> Scoria.

I have no idea why EMI decided to implement adding recipes like this in a resource pack and not a datapack, but this is what we have, so.

Literally just drop this into your resource packs folder and enable it ingame. Should work on any version,  as long as you have Create, EMI, and JEI installed.
